title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Punjab National Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Punjab National Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Punjab National Bank:
Punjab National Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Punjab National Bank!
